Minimum Average(s) Required: A minimum cumulative overall average of 60.0%.
A minimum term average of 60.0%. See promotion rules.

Degree Requirements.Unit Requirements: See major for minimum unit requirements.

All Bachelor of Applied Science (BASc) a: List A: Impact of Technology and/or Engineering on Society
List C: Humanities and Social Sciences (excluding courses concentrated on development of language or other skills)
List D: Other Complementary Studies Courses
Notes: Course substitutions may be permitted with the approval of the Associate Chair.

Unless permitted otherwise in the specific major requirements, a course that appears in more than one of the four lists below may be counted only once; for example, STV100 may be counted as a List A course or a List C course, but not both.

Systems Design Engineering: SYDE101 and SYDE101L
